title: feat(polly): private extensions loader + safer deploy
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly's secret stash
gist.blurb: Polly the bot just got a new hidden compartment! We've added a safe way to load private, VPS-only extensions without tangling up the open-source codebase.
gist.summary: Implemented a generic plugin loader for Polly and updated deployment scripts to safely preserve private, VPS-only extensions.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now deploy the bot safely without rsync accidentally deleting local data or closed-source plugins.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot organizing a secret, glowing drawer or inserting a hidden cartridge into a retro server, representing the private extension loader.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat, carefully sliding a glowing purple cartridge into a chunky retro server. A small code-plant sprouts nearby from a lime green (#ecf874) pot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
